case_title: ROBERTO LOBO FILHO VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILHO, ROBERTO LOBO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILHO, ROBERTO LOBO AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-30-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, REPORTER: BELDON YEE, CSR #2647
ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-16-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-01-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FILHO, ROBERTO LOBO TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO JUDGMENT AFTER SUSTAINED DEMURRER RULING ON SEPT. 28, 2006. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-16-2007 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
